metrolink: On Thursday 11th and Friday 12th June The Weeknd plays at Etihad Stadium. Services will be busier than usual so please plan your journey in advance.
headlines: Holy git! Microsoft code-sharing site suffers downtime, despite move to Azure

crew_quote: "Ah, 14°C and overcast? Perfect weather for a nice curry, or maybe just sitting around waiting for the ship to explode. Either way, I’m not doing anything productive!"
